biography.value:
Defense

AC 17, touch 17, flat-footed 14 (+3 Dex, +4 size)

hp 7 [12] (2d6) mp 2

Fort +0, Ref +6, Will +3

DR 5/cold iron;

Resist Holy 10;

Weakness Shadow

Offense

Speed 15 ft., Fly 60 ft. (perfect)

Melee Shortsword +8 (1d2-3/19-20) Range Shortbow +8 (1d2-3/x3)

Space 2.5 ft.; Reach 0 ft. Spells Known (FC CL 2nd, Concentration +2) At will (DC 10) – Dancing Lights, Daze, Holy Orb 1st (DC 11) – Color Spray, Cure, Light

Statistics

Str 5, Dex 17, Con 11, Int 8, Wis 11, Cha 11

Base Atk +1; CMB -6; CMD 7

Feats Weapon Finesse

Skills Escape Artist +7, Fly +21, Perception +4, Sense Motive +4, Stealth +19

Language Common, Sylvan SQ Luminous Gear Shortsword, Shortbow (10 arrows)

description.value: Generated feat from the source statblock: Weapon Finesse.
The master of a sprite familiar gains a +1 bonus to the saving throw DCs of all spells they cast of the light school.

contextNotes.text: Familiar master bonus; apply this to the master, not to the creature.

ffd20-bestiary-builder.sourceText: The master of a sprite familiar gains a +1 bonus to the saving throw DCs of all spells they cast of the light school.

description.value: A sprite naturally sheds light equal to that provided by a torch. A sprite can control the color and intensity of the light as a swift action, reducing it to the dimness of a candle or even extinguishing its luminosity entirely if its wishes.

contextNotes.text: Sheds torch-equivalent light; can dim or extinguish it as a swift action.
Sheds torch-equivalent light; can dim or extinguish it as a swift action.

description.value: A sprite naturally sheds light equal to that provided by a torch. A sprite can control the color and intensity of the light as a swift action, reducing it to the dimness of a candle or even extinguishing its luminosity entirely if its wishes.

contextNotes.text: Prototype token starts with torch-equivalent light. Dim or extinguish it from token Light controls as a swift action.

description.value: The master of a sprite familiar gains a +1 bonus to the saving throw DCs of all spells they cast of the light school. Drag this buff to the familiar's master.

contextNotes.text: This buff belongs on the familiar's master, not the familiar.
